---
title: "Airport Parking Optimization (ONT)"
image: "https://placehold.co/600x400?text=SEO+Analysis"
categories: [Data Analysis, Time Series, Segmentation, Geospatial Analysis, Geo-targeting]
index: 2
---

#### **Overview**  
Built a geo-targeting and attribution framework combining survey and behavioral data to identify high-value markets, evaluate channel performance, and improve post-event marketing strategy.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Learning Outcomes**  
- Integrated survey data with WiFi behavioral data  
- Built a geo-scoring model using ZIP code analysis  
- Conducted channel attribution and performance analysis  
- Identified traveler segments based on behavior  
- Applied thematic analysis to qualitative responses  
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
#### **Key Skills Gained**  
- Identified high-value geographic markets for targeting  
- Found that multi-channel exposure increases conversion likelihood  
- Validated survey intent using real behavioral data  
- Enabled more effective post-event campaign targeting  
- Improved budget allocation across marketing channels  

:::
:::
